_publications._publicationTitle: Complex splicing pattern generates great diversity in human NF1 transcripts.

_contextSnippet: For the five fragments, a total of 114 clones out of 750 colonies in total showed a different restriction pattern... All together, 46 different transcripts were detected.
details: Used for automated sequencing to identify 46 different NF1 transcript variants from 114 clones out of 750 total colonies
